Seoul BBQ House

4.3
567 reviews
American Foodie
1 week ago Best Korean BBQ in LA! The galbi was perfectly marinated and the banchan selection was incredible.
Korean Visitor
2 weeks ago 갈비가 맛있어요. 다만 가격이 좀 비싼 편이에요. 한국에서 온 관광객으로서 만족스러웠습니다.
Japanese Tourist
3 days ago とても美味しかったです。サービスも良かったですが、少し待ち時間がありました。
Local Regular
a year ago Been coming here for years. Consistent quality, friendly owners. The soju selection is great too.
